remaining_gap: Connection-migration state, packet/path association, and IPv6 send-path surfaces are missing; only the path-agnostic ACK behavior and preferred_address transport-parameter representation are directly traceable in the current repo.
notes: No reconciliation artifact existed for this chunk, so it was treated as greenfield. The implementation layer remains blocked for the migration behavior; only the ACK-generation and preferred-address evidence is now explicitly traced.
